case_title: SAUMING MAH et al VS. ALI JIHAD ELKADI et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MAH, SAUMING LEE, MEI-NA ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT TOMPKINS, DAVE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MAH, SAUMING LEE, MEI-NA ANITA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELKADI, ALI JIHAD TOMPKINS, DAVE TOMPKINS, VICKIE PLAINTIFFS FAILED TO ESTABLISH THE DEFENDANTS WERE NEGLIGENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CO-DEFENDANT DAVE TOMPKINS WAIVES SERVICE. KOKO CHUENG INTERPRETS ENGLISH/CANTONESE - CANTONESE/ENGLISH ON PLAINTIFFS BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-22-2009 - JUDGMENT.

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY MAH, SAUMING LEE, MEI-NA ANITA AS TO DEFENDANT ELKADI, ALI JIHAD TOMPKINS, DAVE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-22-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
